basic_details.job_title: CEPT Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Assistant Manager, Technical Supervisor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Centre for Excellence in Postal Technology (CEPT)
basic_details.short_information: Centre for Excellence in Postal Technology (CEPT) Assistant Manager / Technical Supervisor Notification 2026 has been released on 04 April 2026 on the official website hrsolutions.cept.gov.in. A total of 20 vacancies have been announced through the CEPT Assistant Manager / Technical Supervisor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s Degree with Computer Science as a subject OR Bachelor’s Degree + 1-year Diploma in Computer Science; Experience in Computer Software Development / Computer Software Testing / System Administrator in Central Government Offices
qualification.details: Assistant Manager: Bachelor’s Degree with Computer Science as a subject OR Bachelor’s Degree + 1-year Diploma in Computer Science; Minimum 2 years experience in Computer Software Development / Computer Software Testing / System Administrator in Central Government Offices; Service: Analogous post OR 5 years in Level-6. Technical Supervisor: Bachelor’s Degree with Computer Science as a subject OR Bachelor’s Degree + 1-year Diploma in Computer Science; Minimum 1 year experience in Computer Software Development / Computer Software Testing / System Administrator in Central Government Offices; Service: Analogous post OR 6 years in Level-5 OR 10 years in Level-4.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level-6/7 in the Pay Matrix (Pre-revised PB-2 Rs.9300-34800 + GP Rs.4200/4600)
salary_details.details: Assistant Manager: Level-7 in the Pay Matrix (Pre-revised PB-2 Rs.9300-34800 + GP Rs.4600) Technical Supervisor: Level-6 in the Pay Matrix (Pre-revised PB-2 Rs.9300-34800 + GP Rs.4200)

selection_process: Scrutiny of Applications by Cadre Controlling Authority Vigilance / Cadre Clearance Selection based on eligibility and service record by CEPT
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CEPT Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CEPT to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CEPT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for online application submission is 23 May 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Manager and Technical Supervisor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies. Out of these, 15 are for Assistant Manager and 5 are for Technical Supervisor.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor’s Degree with Computer Science as a subject or a Bachelor’s Degree with a 1-year Diploma in Computer Science, along with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 56 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for CEPT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Manager post?
faq.answer: The Assistant Manager post offers a salary of Level-7 in the Pay Matrix, with a pre-revised pay scale of Rs.9300-34800 + GP Rs.4600.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for the Technical Supervisor post?
faq.answer: The Technical Supervisor post offers a salary of Level-6 in the Pay Matrix, with a pre-revised pay scale of Rs.9300-34800 + GP Rs.4200.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for CEPT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of applications, vigilance/cadre clearance, and final selection based on eligibility and service records.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for CEPT Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article.
